original_image_tags: A scan of the back of a document or a routing sheet. The page is a light gray textured paper with a dark border. At the top center is the word "TRANSMITTED" typed with a line underneath. Below it, oriented upside down, is a blue ink stamp containing the date and location. At the bottom center is a short horizontal line. Two black circular hole punches are visible near the bottom edge. A small black mark is in the bottom left corner.

elements.description: One blue stamped ink impression located at the top center. The text is inverted and reads 'TRANSMITTED', 'Aug 10 3 14 PM 6p.', 'FLT. SERV. CENTER', and 'McCHORD FIELD'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a blue stamped ink impression at the top center with the word 'TRANSMITTED', but Description A omits the specific quoted text within the stamp while Description B provides it, without any contradiction on the text content.
